{
  Item1:
//! This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
//! Structure: HashTable
#![allow(non_camel_case_types)]
#![allow(unused_parens)]
#![allow(missing_docs)]
#![allow(unused_imports)]
#![allow(unused_variables)]
#![allow(unused_unsafe)]
use std::ptr;

fn UnitAt(value: &str, offset: i32) -> u32 {
    let bytes = value.as_bytes();
    let index = if offset >= 0 { offset as usize } else { bytes.len().wrapping_add(offset as usize) };
    bytes[index] as u32
}

fn Length(value: &str) -> i32 { value.len() as i32 }


pub struct MyData;

struct E {
    key: &'static str,
    hash_code: u64,
    next: i8,
}

impl MyData {
    const BUCKETS: [i8; 2] = [
        1, 2
    ];

    const ENTRIES: [E; 2] = [
        E { hash_code: 17837601492779536344, next: -1, key: "test1" }, E { hash_code: 17837601488081284521, next: -1, key: "test2" }
    ];

    #[inline]
    unsafe fn get_hash(value: &str) -> u64 {
        let mut hash: u64 = 352654597;

        let mut ptr = value.as_ptr();
        let mut len = value.len();

        while len > 0 {
            hash = (((hash << 5) | (hash >> 27)).wrapping_add(hash)) ^ (ptr.read() as u64);
            ptr = ptr.add(1);
            len -= 1;
        }

        hash.wrapping_mul(1566083941).wrapping_add(352654597)
    }

    #[must_use]
    pub fn contains(key: &str) -> bool {
        let mut length: i32;
        let mut unitAtNeg1: u32;
        let mut unitAt0: u32;
        length = Length(key);
        if ((length > 5))
        {
         return false;
        }

        unitAtNeg1 = UnitAt(key, -1);
        if ((unitAtNeg1 > 50))
        {
         return false;
        }

        unitAt0 = UnitAt(key, 0);
        if ((unitAt0 > 116))
        {
         return false;
        }

        if ((unitAt0 < 116))
        {
         return false;
        }


        let hash = unsafe { Self::get_hash(key) };
        let index = hash % 2u64;
        let mut i: i8 = (Self::BUCKETS[index as usize] as i8) - 1;

        while i >= 0 {
            let entry = &Self::ENTRIES[i as usize];
            if entry.hash_code == hash && entry.key == key {
                return true;
            }
            i = entry.next;
        }

        false
    }

    pub const ITEM_COUNT: usize = 2;
    pub const MIN_KEY_LENGTH: i32 = 5;
    pub const MAX_KEY_LENGTH: i32 = 5;
    pub const HAS_NUMBER: bool = true;
    pub const HAS_UPPERCASE: bool = false;
    pub const HAS_LOWERCASE: bool = true;
    pub const HAS_SYMBOL: bool = false;
    pub const HAS_WHITESPACE: bool = false;
}
,
  Item2: 
}
